metadata.description: Ontology-First Brain for multi-harness agent swarms — typed Prompt-to-DTC control plane with FDE turn quality checks, structured DTC surfaces, Lead orchestration docs, MCP capability metadata, WorkContract router bindings, agent output contracts, harness ratchet release gates, Codex runtime-gap docs, and BackPropagation ratchet proposals.
